response.justification: Sarah is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with an impressive 18-year track record in full-stack development, open-source contributions, and technical leadership. However, she lacks the required minimum of 8 years specifically building AI-driven solutions, having only recent exposure to AI agents and MCP in her current role. Furthermore, she lacks experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are core requirements for this GenAI-focused position.
strengths: Extensive 18+ year software engineering background with multiple Staff-level roles and proven technical leadership.
Strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure including AWS and Kubernetes.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions.
No demonstrated professional experience with Python, a core technology for the role.
Lacks mentioned experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation pipelines.
